\tzpentry{ID5773}{Trawin Topology Unified Field Theory Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5773 introduces Trawin Topology Unified Field Theory Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ h_{\mu\nu} = A\,\psi^{*}\partial_{\mu}\partial_{\nu}\psi \]
